headline: New ETF Role And Cybersecurity Hire Could Be A Game Changer For State Street (STT)
summary: In March 2026, Dimensional Fund Advisors appointed State Street as end-to-end service provider for its first-of-its-kind U.S. ETF share class structure under new SEC exemptive relief, while State Street also added national security and technology expert Susan Gordon to its board and key committees. Together, these moves underline State Street’s central role in the evolving ETF ecosystem and strengthen its board-level expertise in cybersecurity, critical infrastructure and geopolitical risk...
